queries.text: бывший консультант из BCG или McKinsey, который запустил свой стартап
queries.rationale: Relevant: alumni with a strategy-consulting past (McKinsey/BCG/Bain/Oliver Wyman/Kearney/Accenture) who LATER founded or co-founded their own company (Founder/CEO of a venture, not a consulting title); rank the clearest consultant->founder trajectories first. Small handful (~8-20 core).

queries.text: начинал трейдером, а теперь управляет портфелем
queries.rationale: Relevant: alumni whose earlier role was a trader (трейдер / trader) and who now hold a portfolio-management role (Portfolio Manager / управляющий портфелем / asset management); the trading->PM progression, not just anyone in markets, is the discriminator.

Relevant: alumni with investment-banking experience (ВТБ Капитал, Goldman, Citi, Ренессанс, ECM/M&A analyst/associate) who then moved into venture capital / venture investing (venture fund, general or investment partner, венчурные инвестиции); the IB->VC switch is required.

queries.text: economist who retrained as a data scientist
queries.rationale: Relevant: alumni who worked as an economist (Economist / экономист, often at a bank, central bank or research institute) and LATER became a Data Scientist / ML engineer in industry; the economist->DS career switch is the discriminator (~12-14 core profiles).

Relevant: alumni who worked at a bank (Сбер, ВТБ, Альфа, Тинькофф, Райффайзен etc.) and subsequently at a big-tech company (Яндекс, Ozon, Avito, Google, VK, Uber, Amazon); rank the clearest bank->tech moves first.

queries.text: эксперт, который может прокомментировать политику ЦБ
queries.rationale: Relevant: senior economists / researchers with Central Bank of Russia monetary-policy substance (Банк России, аналитика ЦБ, макроэкономика, денежно-кредитная политика) who could authoritatively comment on rates/inflation policy; seniority (deputy chair, department heads, lead/chief economists) ranks first over junior ЦБ staff.

queries.text: кто может помочь с выходом компании на IPO
queries.rationale: Relevant: alumni with equity-capital-markets / IPO experience (Размещение ценных бумаг, ECM, equity origination in investment banking, plus M&A) who could advise a company going public; ECM/IPO substance ranks above generic corporate-finance profiles.

queries.text: нужен человек, который поможет продать бизнес и провести сделку M&A
queries.rationale: Relevant: alumni with mergers-and-acquisitions / sell-side deal experience (Слияния и поглощения, M&A banker/associate, investment banking deal execution) who could advise on selling a company and structuring the transaction.

queries.text: кто поможет вывести бизнес на азиатские рынки
queries.rationale: Relevant: alumni with genuine Asia experience (country_expertise Азия, work in China/Singapore/Hong Kong, Asia-focused business development, strategy or investment) who could advise on entering Asian markets; real Asia footprint required, not a passing mention.

queries.text: выпускник, работающий экономистом в МВФ или Всемирном банке
queries.rationale: Relevant: alumni employed as economists/analysts at an international financial organization — IMF / МВФ, World Bank / Всемирный банк, or EBRD / ЕБРР. Only a small handful of profiles (~6) name these employers, so the gold set is tiny and precision-ranking the real matches to the top is the whole test.

queries.text: founder building a product on top of machine learning
queries.rationale: Relevant: alumni who founded/co-founded a company AND have machine-learning/AI substance (ML Engineer, Data Scientist, AI startup); BOTH the founder role and the ML-product angle must be present, not one or the other (~9 core profiles).

Relevant: alumni who founded/co-founded a fintech company (payments, digital banking, crypto-finance, financial-services startup — e.g. JetLend, Axevil Capital, Payhamster, Offset8); the founder role at a financial-technology venture is the signal (~7 core profiles).

Relevant: alumni who founded/co-founded an education venture or school (edtech, online school, tutoring/educational project, Skyeng-type); founder/co-founder role at an education-focused company is required (~7-11 core profiles).

Relevant: alumni with a quantitative-research/trading background (quant researcher/developer, algotrading) who moved into crypto/blockchain (crypto fund, DeFi, digital assets, Head of DeFi); the quant->crypto pivot is required (~8 core profiles).

Relevant: alumni doing algorithmic/quantitative trading at a hedge fund or prop-trading firm (WorldQuant, Citadel, Pinely, XTX Markets, Teza, алготрейдинг, quantitative researcher at a fund); systematic-trading-at-a-fund substance is the signal (~10 core profiles).

Relevant: alumni who studied at MIPT / Физтех (МФТИ pre-NES education) AND now work in quantitative finance (quant researcher/analyst, algotrading, hedge fund, strat at a bank); the physics-school->quant-finance path is the discriminator (~47 core out of the ~400 MIPT alumni).

Relevant: alumni trading physical or financial commodities/energy (commodity/energy trader, FX & commodities, oil-gas trading desk, grains/cross-commodity quant); commodity-trading focus is required, not equities or generic finance (~24 core profiles).

Relevant: alumni who are macro economists/strategists covering emerging markets (country_expertise Emerging markets, macro research/strategy, CIS/EM economics, sell-side EM strategy); EM-focused macro analysis is the discriminator, not any economist.

Relevant: alumni working as sell-side equity research analysts (Equity Research Analyst / аналитик по акциям at a bank or broker covering stocks, professional_expertise 'По акциям'); equity-research coverage is the signal, NOT buy-side portfolio managers or generic analysts (~38 core profiles).

Relevant: alumni in academic positions (assistant/associate professor, lecturer, researcher) whose work involves machine learning / statistics / data science; academic ML/quant research is required, not industry-only DS (~14 core profiles).

queries.text: риск-менеджер, который строит модели кредитного риска
queries.rationale: Relevant: alumni in risk management who BUILD or VALIDATE quantitative risk models (credit-risk modeling, model validation, scoring, quant risk at banks/fintech); model-building substance beyond generic operational risk is required (~21 core profiles).

queries.text: выпускник, который уехал работать в западную бигтех-компанию
queries.rationale: Relevant: alumni who relocated abroad and currently work at a Western big-tech major (Google, Amazon, Microsoft, Meta, Booking, Revolut, Zalando); a current role at a foreign tech company is the signal, ranking present roles above old internships (~57 core, out of ~97 who ever worked at such firms).
Relevant = profile with McKinsey & Company in main_work or additional_work (~92 alumni); rank current/senior McKinsey people highest.
Relevant = worked at Goldman Sachs (~28 alumni); a specific investment-bank employer where ranking the true GS people above generic 'analyst' noise matters.
Relevant = employed at WorldQuant (~23 alumni), a quant hedge fund; small discriminative set where the exact-employer match is what counts.
Relevant = worked at Ренессанс Капитал / Renaissance Capital (~35 alumni); an investment bank, rank actual employees above lookalike 'капитал' firms.
Relevant = current or past Avito employee (~44 alumni); 'работает' implies preferring current-role Avito profiles at the top.
Relevant = worked at Тинькофф / Т-Банк / TCS (~105 alumni); rank clear T-Bank employees above generic bank profiles.
Relevant = employed at Газпромбанк (~74 alumni); must distinguish Газпромбанк from unrelated Газпром/other banks.
Relevant = worked at Deutsche Bank AG (~61 alumni); rank true DB people above other German/investment banks.
Relevant = employed at Центральный банк РФ / Bank of Russia (~68 alumni); rank CBR staff above commercial-bank profiles (esp. Сбербанк, which must NOT match).
Relevant = worked at BCG (~58 alumni); a specific MBB strategy firm, rank true BCG consultants above other consulting.
Relevant = job position is a trader (trader/трейдер, ~102 alumni); rank explicit trading roles above generic finance analysts.
Relevant = product manager / продакт role (~62 alumni); rank explicit product roles above project managers and generic managers.
Relevant = CFO / финансовый директор position (~46 alumni); rank the actual finance-director title above generic finance analysts.
Relevant = founder / co-founder / основатель title (~107 alumni); rank explicit founder roles above ordinary employees.
Relevant = portfolio manager / управляющий портфелем role (~38 alumni); rank explicit PM-of-assets titles above generic asset-management staff.
Relevant = investment analyst / инвестиционный аналитик role (~55 alumni); rank explicitly investment-focused analysts above plain analysts.
Relevant = product manager whose residence city is Moscow (~37 alumni); both the role and the Moscow location must match.
Relevant = investment-banking role (associate/VP/analyst at an IB) residing in London (~34-49); needs both London residence and a banking role.
Relevant = data scientist based in Moscow (~41-51 alumni); rank Moscow-resident DS profiles above out-of-city ones.
Relevant = works in oil & gas / топливно-энергетическое industry (~141 alumni, e.g. Роснефть, СИБУР, ЕвроХим); rank energy-sector profiles above generic finance.
Relevant = industry is hedge fund / хедж-фонд (~40-44 alumni, e.g. WorldQuant); rank true hedge-fund roles above general asset management.
Relevant = works at a venture capital fund / венчурный фонд (~43-56 alumni); rank VC-industry profiles above generic investment roles.
Relevant: hobbies field lists альпинизм, скалолазание, горный туризм or хайкинг (mountaineering/climbing enthusiasts, ~48 profiles); plain горные лыжи/сноуборд alone is not enough.
Relevant: hobbies include покер / poker (~20 profiles); other card or board games count only if poker is explicitly named.
Relevant: hobbies list парусный спорт, яхтинг or sailing (sailing enthusiasts, ~17 profiles).
Relevant: hobbies mention триатлон (triathletes, ~8 profiles); a bare бег or плавание alone does not qualify.
Relevant: hobbies include дайвинг / подводное плавание (scuba diving, ~14 profiles).

queries.text: alumni into esports and video games
queries.rationale: Relevant: hobbies list киберспорт, видеоигры or компьютерные игры (gaming/esports, ~34 profiles); generic board games excluded.
Relevant: hobbies field explicitly includes гольф / golf (~5 profiles); a tiny set where ranking those few to the top is the test.
Relevant: hobbies mention поэзия or writing стихи (poetry, ~17 profiles); prose reading alone does not count.
Relevant: hobbies list автоспорт, картинг, формула 1, гонки or мотоциклы (motorsport fans, ~30 profiles).
Relevant: pre-NES university is НИЯУ МИФИ / Национальный исследовательский ядерный университет «МИФИ» (~48 profiles).
Relevant: pre-NES education at Финансовый университет при Правительстве РФ (~49 profiles).
Relevant: pre-NES university is РЭУ им. Г.В. Плеханова (colloquial 'Плехановка', ~37 profiles).
Relevant: pre-NES education at МГИМО МИД России (stored as 'Московский государственный институт международных отношений', ~38 profiles; the acronym must bridge).
Relevant: pre-NES university is МГТУ им. Н.Э. Баумана (~71 profiles); the colloquial 'Бауманка' must bridge to the full name.
Relevant: pre-NES education at London School of Economics (~5 profiles); a tiny discriminative set where ranking the real LSE alumni to the top matters.

Relevant: alumni affiliated with Università Bocconi / Боккони — in this feed it surfaces as the academic employer 'Коммерческий университет им. Луиджи Боккони' on a small handful (~3) of professor profiles, NOT as a pre-NES degree; ranking those few Bocconi-linked profiles to the top is the test.
Relevant: pre-NES specialty/degree is юриспруденция (law, ~14 profiles), before switching to economics at NES.
Relevant: pre-NES university is Санкт-Петербургский государственный университет (~34-38 profiles); NOT СПбПУ/Политех or ИТМО.
Should return Гришина Екатерина Дмитриевна (nes_id 14880) and NOT the other Гришина, Анна Вячеславовна (nes_id 27); first name disambiguates.
Exactly Гончаров Сергей Викторович (nes_id 926); there are 6 Гончаровых but only one Сергей, so the full name pins the gold to this single person.
Should return Кнобель Александр Юрьевич (nes_id 491); Кнобель is a unique surname in the feed, gold is exactly one person.
Should return Персиянов Иван Сергеевич (nes_id 776); Персиянов is a unique surname, gold is exactly one person.
Should return Багаутдинов Искандар Зульфирович (nes_id 14474); unique surname, single unambiguous match.
Surname-only query; should return Хейфец Игорь Леонидович (nes_id 647), the only Хейфец in the feed.
Surname-only query; should return Постолит Егор Анатольевич (nes_id 12204), the only Постолит in the feed.
Surname-only query; should return Пьянков Никита Евгеньевич (nes_id 3112), the only Пьянков in the feed.
Surname-only query; should return Простева Евгения Анатольевна (nes_id 3375), the only Простева in the feed.
English command + Latin transliteration of a Cyrillic name; should return Бикбов Руслан Раилевич (nes_id 3236), the only Бикбов in the feed.
Latin transliteration; should return Янакидис Иоаннис Спартакович (nes_id 3675) and NOT the other Янакидис, Харис Валерисович (nes_id 2747); the first name Ioannis disambiguates.
Latin transliteration; should return Камаева Ольга Олеговна (nes_id 14683), the only Камаева in the feed.
Latin transliteration; should return Носырев Максим Радикович (nes_id 3483), the only Носырев in the feed.
Lightly misspelled surname (о->а: Карсунов for Корсунов); should still return Корсунов Сергей Сергеевич (nes_id 13326), the only Корсунов in the feed; 'Карсунов' matches no real surname.
